description: A designed share-card built from a screenshot of a local news article (The Batavian). At top is the bold black sans-serif headline 'Graduates of inaugural welding pre-apprentice program ready for workforce', followed by an italic byline 'By Howard B. Owens' and date 'Aug 15, 2025, 7:56am'. Below, framed by a thin gray border, is a color group photograph taken in what looks like a school locker room/hallway (green lockers, cinder-block walls, an American flag at upper left): a row of about nine people pose for the camera. Several are young male graduates in casual/work clothes holding red-and-white certificates of completion; flanking them are adults including a woman in a navy dress and several men (one in a light blue polo, one in a black polo, one in a gray shirt with tattoos). The image is a credibility-borrowing repost of a positive local-news story to support the tweet's 'READY FOR THE WORKFORCE' / welding-apprenticeship message. Target audience: general public and prospective trade students, promoting the administration's workforce-training agenda. No government seal is on the image; OCR includes detector noise.
notable_text: Graduates of inaugural welding pre-apprentice program ready for workforce; By Howard B. Owens, Aug 15, 2025
